items.key: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref2]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref2]}%' else '''' end and status = '1'
items.check: bp_ref like case when '{$%c[bp_ref2]}' <> '' then '{$%c[bp_ref2]}%' else '''' end

action.text: declare @b varchar(128) select @b = '' if exists(select 1 from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp2) select @b = bp_ref from hrbp where ma_bp = @ma_bp2 select @b as value return
